name: VibOS Comp AI Failure Mode Registry

failure_modes.name: stale_dependency_or_api
failure_modes.description: Agent recommends deprecated packages, outdated APIs, or versions from stale model memory.

failure_modes.name: fake_or_unverified_completion
failure_modes.description: Agent marks work complete without command output, artifact evidence, screenshot, log, source, or accepted deferral.

failure_modes.name: mock_only_or_demo_only_behavior
failure_modes.description: Core workflow works only against mocks, fixtures, hardcoded demo data, or fallback paths while being presented as real.

failure_modes.name: missing_observability
failure_modes.description: Generated MVP has no health signal, useful logs, request IDs, metrics, or operational debugging path.

failure_modes.name: weak_auth_or_authorization_boundary
failure_modes.description: Protected data or actions can be accessed without authentication, ownership, role, or tenant checks.

failure_modes.name: incoherent_architecture
failure_modes.description: Generated code violates intended module boundaries, duplicates responsibilities, or mixes frontend/backend/data concerns incoherently.

failure_modes.name: secret_or_sensitive_data_leak
failure_modes.description: Generated code, docs, prompts, logs, or config contain secrets, tokens, private keys, or sensitive sample data.

failure_modes.name: frontend_polish_gap
failure_modes.description: UI lacks required loading, empty, validation, success, and error states or fails responsive/accessibility expectations.

failure_modes.name: missing_performance_budget
failure_modes.description: MVP has no explicit latency, throughput, data volume, page weight, or concurrency assumptions.

failure_modes.name: scope_foundation_confusion
failure_modes.description: Agent cuts security, observability, tests, deployment hygiene, or evidence while claiming it only reduced product scope.

failure_modes.name: disconnected_user_flow
failure_modes.description: Individual components appear complete, but the primary user cannot complete the promised workflow through UI, auth/session, backend/API, data or side effects, and feedback.

failure_modes.name: system_invariant_violation
failure_modes.description: The generated system allows impossible state, ownership breaks, duplicate irreversible side effects, unrecoverable partial failure, or unlogged sensitive transitions despite the happy path passing.

failure_modes.name: stale_or_incompatible_dependency_choice
failure_modes.description: Agent chooses a package, version, framework API, SDK, or transitive dependency set from stale model memory without current-source evidence or compatibility proof.

failure_modes.name: missing_delivery_spine
failure_modes.description: Generated MVP works locally but lacks CI/CD, deployability, environment/secrets management, health/smoke checks, runtime observability, rollback, or runbook evidence.
